title: Changing the order of replies in Updates

posts.author: tiffany22 (Tiffany)
posts.cookedHtml: I’ve seen other topics similar to this but not quite the same. It looks like are nesting replies to comments which is great but wondering if you could change how the replies are displayed. For example, have the most recent reply at the top instead of at the bottom. Kind of like on Facebook where you can arrange comments to view the most recent ones first. It would be nice to view the replies this way. The comments are already arranged like that but the replies to each comment are only shown oldest to newest at the bottom. It doesn’t have to be a permanent change, but rather an option so each company/person can choose to review replies however it suits them best.
